= Form Sequences =

== [[Zombie Form]] ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Brain Parasite}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Alien Hookworm}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Despot Cells}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Antiseptic Stone}}
|}

== [[Demon Form]] ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Flames of Plague}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Flames of Famine}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Flames of War}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Flames of Death}}
|}

== [[Angel Form]] ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Gospel of Matthew}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Gospel of Luke}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Gospel of John}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Gospel of the Hebrews}}
|}

== [[Mutant Form]] ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Alpha Ray}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Beta Ray}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Gamma Ray}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Sigma Ray}}
|}

== [[Mecha Form]] ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Detection Unit}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Engineering Unit}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Power Unit}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Fire Control Unit}}
|}

== [[Dragon Form]] ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Ice Breath}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Flame Breath}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Emerald Breath}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Holy Breath}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Fairy Dragon Power}}
|}

= Ritual Items =

== [[Zombie Form]] ==

== [[Demon Form]] ==

== [[Angel Form]] ==

== [[Mutant Form]] ==

== [[Mecha Form]] ==

== [[Dragon Form]] ==

= [[Super Gene Expert]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Zombie Toxin}}||Zombie
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Flame Core}}||Demon
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Saint's Book}}||Angel
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Radioactive Core}}||Mutant
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Crystal IC Board}}||Mecha
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Dragon Serum}}||Dragon
|}

[[Category:Icons]]
